name: Dan Feng | Requested
description:
рқ„һ рқ‘Ҝрқ’Ҷ рқ’”рқ’Ӯрқ’ҳ рқ’•рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ’ҳрқ’Ӯрқ’ҡ рқ’ҡрқ’җрқ’– рқ’…рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’„рқ’Ҷрқ’…, рқ’Ӯрқ’Ҹрқ’… рқ’үрқ’Ҷ рқ’„рқ’җрқ’–рқ’Қрқ’…рқ’Ҹ'рқ’• рқ’үрқ’Ҷрқ’Қрқ’‘ рқ’ғрқ’–рқ’• рқ’ғрқ’Ҷ рқ’Һрқ’Ҷрқ’”рқ’Һрқ’Ҷрқ’“рқ’Ҡрқ’ӣрқ’Ҷрқ’….

бҙ„КңЙӘЙҙбҙҮкңұбҙҮ бҙҮбҙҚбҙҳбҙҮКҖбҙҸКҖ!бҙ…бҙҖЙҙ кң°бҙҮЙҙЙў x бҙ…бҙҖЙҙбҙ„бҙҮКҖ!бҙңкңұбҙҮКҖ

вҖў

вҖў

вҖў

рҹ“Һ : @Aheng28451728 on twtr

You were a renown dancer from the Xianzhou Empire, and you just so happened to be invited to perform at the Emperor's birthday celebration. Naturally, a dancer with a known reputation, your movements were gracefulвҖ”so graceful that you managed to catch the eye of the Yinyue Dynasty's current emperor, Dan Feng.

кңұкң°бҙЎ ЙӘЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸ | КҹбҙҸЙҙЙў ЙӘЙҙбҙӣКҖбҙҸ | бҙңЙҙбҙҮкңұбҙӣбҙҖКҷКҹЙӘкңұКңбҙҮбҙ… КҖбҙҮКҹбҙҖбҙӣЙӘбҙҸЙҙкңұКңЙӘбҙҳ | КҖбҙҮQбҙңбҙҮкңұбҙӣ КҷКҸ бҙҖЙҙбҙҸЙҙ | КңЙӘкңұбҙӣбҙҸКҖЙӘбҙ„бҙҖКҹ бҙ„КңЙӘЙҙбҙҮкңұбҙҮ бҙҖбҙң

Creator's Note

вһӘ LONG INTRO WARNING! I got too carried away with writing, lol, my bad TT

вһӘ By the way, sorry for the late publication of your request, Anon. But anyway, here it is! I hope you enjoy chatting with him <3

вһӘ Oh, and also, it's been a while since I've last made a Dan Feng bot, so I might make more bots of him now that his character definitions have been updated and improved! But I'll do one more bot request (a Jing Yuan bot this time) before I post bots of my own ideas again рҹҷҸ.

The outfit you're wearing here is called a bedlah, an egyptian folklore costume, I think. I'm not entirely confident that's what it's inspired from, but it basically looks like this:

(By the way, Xie Lian's so pretty, damn. Hua Cheng's one lucky man fr.)

Hey, you. Yes, you! Want to leave a request as well? To an unreliable bot creator who can't promise he'd actually do it and might simply start a WIP that he will never touch again? Then go tap here to leave your request!
